metadata.description: LogicLeap Labs — open Claude Code plugins for shipping AI output that's actually good. By Josh Matthews / LogicLeap Ltd.

plugins.name: visual-quality
plugins.description: A hard quality gate for any work with pixels. Forces transcribe-before-you-judge review of the ACTUAL rendered UI (Xcode/SwiftUI, web, Electron, mockups), a Stop hook that blocks 'done' when UI was edited/screenshotted but never reviewed, an automated QC command, and an independent adversarial reviewer subagent. Stops 'compiles → screenshot → looks good → done' from shipping obvious defects.

plugins.name: verify-before-done
plugins.description: Blocks 'done' when code changed but nothing was run to verify it. Skill + Stop hook: require test/build/lint/smoke evidence or VERIFY-BEFORE-DONE: PASS. Stops 'edited the handler → should work → done' without proof.

plugins.name: scope-guard
plugins.description: Keeps an agent in its lane. Declare the files a task may touch (a .scope-guard file, an env var, or a SCOPE-GUARD: sentinel) and a PreToolUse hook blocks any Edit/Write outside that set — stopping drive-by edits, 'while I'm here' refactors, and one agent clobbering another's files on a shared tree.

plugins.name: no-stub
plugins.description: Blocks 'done' when the code you just wrote is half-written. Skill + Stop hook: detect stub/placeholder markers — TODO/FIXME, NotImplementedError, empty `...` bodies, 'your code here' — in code edited this turn, and refuse the turn until it's real or marked NO-STUB: INTENTIONAL. Stops 'scaffold the function → leave a TODO → done' from shipping.

plugins.name: secret-guard
plugins.description: Stops a live secret from ever landing in source. A PreToolUse hook scans the new content of every Edit/Write for real-looking credentials — AWS keys, GitHub/OpenAI/Stripe/Slack tokens, Google keys, private keys, hardcoded api_key literals — and blocks the write before it hits a tracked file. Allows .env files, placeholders, and env reads (process.env / os.environ); fails open.

plugins.name: no-slop
plugins.description: Blocks 'done' when the prose you just wrote reads like AI slop. Skill + Stop hook: detect high-precision AI tells — 'delve into', 'it's worth noting that', 'a testament to', 'navigate the complexities', 'rich tapestry', em-dash pile-ups — in prose edited this turn (.md/.mdx/.txt/.rst), and refuse the turn until it's plain or marked NO-SLOP: INTENTIONAL. The prose complement to no-stub. Stops 'write the README → pad it with clichés → done' from shipping.

plugins.name: no-debug
plugins.description: Blocks 'done' when the code you just wrote still has leftover debug noise. Skill + Stop hook: detect high-signal debug markers — console.log/debugger, pdb.set_trace/breakpoint, binding.pry/byebug, dd()/var_dump, dbg!(), debug-ish prints — in code edited this turn, and refuse the turn until it's stripped or marked NO-DEBUG: INTENTIONAL. Lets console.error/warn and real loggers through. Stops 'add a console.log to check → forget it → done' from shipping.
